title: Hornemannia goodeniifolia
taxonomy: Hornemannia goodeniifolia is classified within the family Lythraceae. This plant belongs to the genus Hornemannia. The species Hornemannia goodeniifolia is native to China and other parts of Asia. It is a flowering plant that is closely related to other plants in the Lythraceae family. Hornemannia goodeniifolia is also known by its synonyms, which include Lythrum goodeniifolium and Hornemannia chinensis.
